# Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning, LLC

> Professional soft washing and pressure washing company serving Northwest Indiana, North Central Indiana, and Southwest Michigan. Licensed, bonded, and insured. 53 five-star reviews on Google and Facebook. Residential and commercial exterior cleaning.

## Business Summary

Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning, LLC is a professional exterior cleaning company based in Northwest Indiana. The company specializes in soft washing and pressure washing for both residential and commercial properties. They are fully licensed, bonded, and insured, and use commercial-grade equipment for every job. The company has earned 53 five-star reviews across Google and Facebook and was named NWI Life Spotlight Business of the Month.

## Contact

- Phone: 219-307-1207
- Website: https://underpressureexterior.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/Under-Pressure-Exterior-Cleaning-100064698066523/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/_underpressure_llc_/

## Service Area

- Northwest Indiana (Valparaiso, Chesterton, Portage, Michigan City, La Porte, Crown Point, Merrillville, Hobart, Schererville, St. John, Wanatah)
- North Central Indiana
- Southwest Michigan (New Buffalo and surrounding areas)

## Residential Services

- House Washing (soft wash for siding, soffits, fascia, gutters)
- Roof Cleaning (soft wash to remove black streaks, moss, algae)
- Driveway & Concrete Cleaning
- Concrete Sealing
- Decks & Fences
- Rust Removal
- Paver Cleaning, Sanding & Sealing

## Commercial Services

Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning serves commercial clients including property management companies, HOAs, schools, retail centers, restaurants, and office buildings. Commercial services include:

- Building & Storefront Washing
- Drive-Thru & High-Traffic Area Cleaning
- Parking Lot & Garage Cleaning
- Property Management (ongoing service for HOAs, schools, retail centers, office buildings)
- Schools, Retail Centers & Office Exteriors

## Credentials

- Licensed
- Bonded
- Insured
- NWI Life Spotlight Business of the Month (award)
- 53 five-star reviews (Google and Facebook combined)
- 4+ years in business

## What Sets Them Apart

- Commercial-grade equipment at competitive residential pricing
- Soft wash process that eliminates growth at the root for longer-lasting results
- Direct communication with the owner — responsive and flexible scheduling
- Willing to take jobs of any size, from a single side of a house to full commercial properties

## Detailed Information

For full service descriptions, FAQs, before-and-after photos, customer reviews, and a free estimate form, visit: https://underpressureexterior.com
